holdings.infoBox: XNAV is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings.

overview.description: The fundX Aggressive ETF (XNAV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an active, global fund-of-funds that primarily invests in sector and aggressive equity ETFs based on global market trends. XNAV was launched on Jul 1, 2002 and is issued by FundX.
